0090580c-04ef-9d84-e883-32f52c977b98.description: Plants a stubborn gumdrop stance — soaks part of the next blow.

01b34a91-37d8-29d4-09cb-2d515f51e315.description: Binds you to an ALLY in shimmering caramel: you take the next single blow aimed at them, at 70% of its force. Pick an ally, not an enemy. Deals no damage.

1a67cc79-b97a-4624-ca67-36c9fcbee970.description: A flashing mercury-quick slash — rare speed backing up serious power.

1d1dec74-ca35-0cc4-d930-164786a9dd81.description: A frantic chocolate-fisted flurry, fast enough to strike before the foe can react.

1e47a8e0-acfd-1244-0b7d-539d62429060.description: A swift dollop of icing flicked like a whip — light but blisteringly fast.

2569d967-c676-8b44-cbdf-d514e4c5c73d.description: A sticky toffee snare underfoot, punished the instant the foe stumbles.

29d559bb-41a7-9f14-5bf8-605da8166943.description: A sour candy flicked straight at the face — disorienting more than damaging.

2c555752-8a84-58f4-395e-6460b7864069.description: Yanks the fight to close range with a taffy-rope pull before landing the hit.

2c94f949-a10e-2524-2827-6588982ce0b1.description: A springy berry-skin stance: strike, then bounce 40% of any blow that lands on you this round straight back at whoever threw it. It soaks nothing — it punishes.

34a115db-3153-aff4-9a46-97700634f1fb.description: A gilded feint that sends the foe stumbling before the real blow lands.

3e76f2fa-072c-5654-dac9-c9b0e4e1643a.description: An overloaded sugar rush pushed past the limit — top-tier speed with the power to match.

41416afb-0d72-f9b4-ba30-f089b713500f.description: Hardens into a glassy candy shell worth 20 points of shield. It soaks damage before your health does and KEEPS whatever is left over for later rounds. Deals no damage.

431900a2-54d4-df34-d9f7-6a4608fecfaa.description: Goes soft and gummy, letting the next hit sink in without doing its full damage.

4dbb297f-6a80-ca44-a94f-3ea9ed3311e8.description: Drops into a tarnished-silver crouch that digs in and shrugs off part of the next strike.

55cafe03-4a58-0f44-6a27-f9fc6fce881a.description: A heavier stomp into a gumdrop stance, braced hard against whatever's coming.

55e05ece-a3f6-a924-3833-2222a0eee6a3.description: A razor-edged lime candy flung like a shuriken — sharp reach damage from afar.

61d8b3ec-9a01-0e64-fb45-27d2b858e332.description: A jawbreaker packed with popping powder — the biggest bang in the loadout, slow to load.

628ebc0b-bb19-ee64-68b8-2f66f4b92720.description: A blur of paper-thin candy shards — many quick nicks rather than one big cut.

73eb61fc-70a9-25a4-ba01-0ecaa0d547c5.description: Raises a crystallized sugar shield worth 12 points. It soaks damage before your health does and carries whatever survives into the next round. Deals no damage.

86b323c2-b2fd-2494-ab5e-bc3514bc92d8.description: A basic candy-coated haymaker — dependable weight behind every swing.

86bd4f81-e96b-9864-78b5-5fc51fbff6a4.description: A frosty strike thrown from range that chills on impact — reach over raw power.

8e4753b5-c739-aaf4-ab79-4d333a69cae6.description: A heavier bouncing riposte: strike, then hurl 40% of any blow that lands on you this round back at its owner. Soaks nothing — a big enough hit still fells you before you swing back.

92f7b745-c1ff-3cd4-f9cf-0fe0dafb5536.description: Rains gilded chocolate chips down in a devastating downpour — the hardest hit around, slow to wind up.

9f0df0ed-13a6-84c4-781d-9dbf9741c66e.description: A crunching chocolate-bar clothesline — solid, no-frills power.

9fd0b9ef-2e7d-d344-8926-69f1fab99f65.description: A fistful of popping candy detonated point-blank — quick to throw, light but always ready.

a9d69fc0-a1b8-ae24-cbd7-249760200211.description: A bubblegum bubble lobbed from afar that pops right on target.

aa7d8565-99e1-84f4-49d2-8925c2602a7b.description: Winds up and hurls a rock-hard jawbreaker — brutal, but you'll see it coming.

ad6d5d28-08b4-4304-6b49-11f8f5f9ff1c.description: A caffeinated burst of speed that closes distance and lands before the foe can set up.

b1bd32de-88b2-1204-7b2e-0680677d78c4.description: Slides a caramel puddle underfoot and closes the gap in a flash.

b889835e-1cd6-d3d4-f9b4-dd1989f49dac.description: A cheeky low blow to the jellybean midsection — as rude as it is effective.

b96f1ff8-66d5-f244-79fd-260735d4c3d7.description: An unsettling gut-churner of a hit that leaves the target queasy and off their game.

bbf71f26-78f5-5014-5b4b-a1c3866cb75b.description: A crackling metallic coating that shocks on contact — unpredictable and painful.

bd27fe1c-ce9a-f524-c887-61f9e4d5088b.description: A low sweeping kick that scatters loose sugar and knocks the foe off balance.

c28e13b4-cb1f-6ea4-680f-91010a400e10.description: A snappy jab aimed straight at the sweet spot — quick and precise.

c6770789-4a1f-7f24-f921-c4dc66c2697a.description: A shimmering hail of golden shot fired from range — punishing reach damage.

e16531a7-33fd-a3e4-69fd-ff10eba65cb7.description: A licorice haymaker thrown with everything behind it — heavy, but leaves an opening.

e201f964-8949-9d74-fbee-4ee8786284ca.description: A fiery cinnamon burst hurled across the arena — stings from a distance.

e55a3d69-9fb4-5194-4812-c2f85e887aca.description: A knuckle-duster forged from hardened silver taffy — a slow, bone-rattling haymaker.

fa6144f9-ad49-8124-386f-351a7f1ab546.description: Drifts in soft as butter cream, then lands a hit the foe never saw coming.
